releases.title: Uncrustify 0.83.0
releases.description:
This version contains 44 new options.

### Pre compiled binaries for Windows

64 bits: [uncrustify-0.83.0_f-win64.zip](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/27889352/uncrustify-0.83.0_f-win64.zip)
32 bits: [uncrustify-0.83.0_f-win32.zip](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/27889414/uncrustify-0.83.0_f-win32.zip)

### Source code
[uncrustify-0.83.0.tar.gz](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/27889479/uncrustify-0.83.0.tar.gz)
[uncrustify-0.83.0.zip](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/27889511/uncrustify-0.83.0.zip)


### Building from source

Please refer to the [build](https://github.com/uncrustify/uncrustify#build) section in the README file for instructions on how to build Uncrustify from source.
